parsed_review.summary: CP00-472 is a descriptor-only RP15 (Firm Analytics) closeout pack covering RP15.P07.M05.S17-RP15.P07.M06.S04 (risk A, 10 units: M05 Permission And Audit Binding tail x6, M06 Synthetic Fixture Set head x4). The pack-level claim is production_ready=false / runtime_ready=false / implementation_layer=descriptor, and that claim is fully supported: the pack binding is identical across manifest, analytics-core-contract.json, registry.js, review-baseline.json, and closeout-pack-plan.json; deliverable distribution {test:2,security_audit:1,hermes_evidence:1,claude_review:1,implementation:1,failure_recovery:4} and micro-title distribution {Permission And Audit Binding:6,Synthetic Fixture Set:4} match the baseline exactly. freezeCp472Result and ANALYTICS_CORE_CP472_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION enforce descriptor-only/synthetic-only/no-real-data/no-write/no-runtime on every row; inherited no-leak guards exclude permission-decision detail, audit body, blocked-claim detail, Hermes packet body, fixture payload, and raw payload. Authority boundaries hold: claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human approval required for runtime opening; Hermes is used only as a static deterministic evidence/receipt descriptor (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. CP178+ hardening is present via forbidden_review_evidence (failed auth, zero-byte, malformed JSON, fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped, disabled tools, missing raw-output/inspection-basis, final-approval/enterprise-trust claims). Three dedicated CP472 tests plus the RP15 validation script (which deep-equals the embedded contract descriptor against the generated one) cover coverage, descriptor-only rows, and authority boundaries; command-evidence records all implementation/plan/repo-wide gates at exit 0. Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are correctly absent because they are produced after this review in the hardening sequence. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues identified; this read-only review does not constitute final approval.
